title: Up Front
writer: Bill Mauldin, Stanley Roberts, Ring Lardner Jr.
actors: David Wayne, Tom Ewell, Marina Berti
plot: Based on the famed World War II cartoons, lowbrow G.I.s Willie and Joe, on the Italian front, are good soldiers in combat, but meet the antics of gung-ho Captain Johnson and other military SNAFUs with a barrage of wry comments. On...
